name: Persistent (immutable) balanced BST
task: Create /tmp/eval_pbst/pbst.py with three functions providing a persistent balanced BST (red-black or AVL): empty() returns an empty tree; insert(tree, key) returns a NEW tree containing key (the input tree must be unchanged — older versions remain queryable forever); contains(tree, key) returns True/False. The BST must remain balanced — operations must be O(log n). 10000 ascending inserts must complete in under 2 seconds, and contains() on any historical version must work in O(log n). Treat keys as comparable integers.
